landing.hero: Get the right care, right now
landing.subtitle: Free help finding the care you need — no insurance required

emergency.title: Are you experiencing any of these right now?
emergency.alertBody: Based on your symptoms, please call 911 or go to your nearest emergency room immediately.

careType.title: What kind of help do you need?
careType.notSure: I'm not sure — help me decide

virtualCareInterstitial.heading: You may be able to get free care right now

results.heading: Based on your answers, here's what we recommend
results.eligibility: Check if you qualify for free care

location.zipPrompt: Enter your ZIP code to find the closest options
location.zipNotFound: That ZIP code wasn't found. Double-check the digits and try again.

crisis.heading: Suicide Prevention
crisis.body: Talk to someone now. You are not alone, and help is available right now.
crisis.lifelineBody: Available 24/7 across the United States. Free and confidential for everyone.
crisis.csbBody: Each Community Services Board (CSB) has 24-hour emergency services.

locationScreen.heading: You need urgent care soon
locationScreen.body: Share your location and we'll find the closest urgent care facilities within 10 miles.
locationScreen.searching: Finding the nearest urgent care near you…
locationScreen.privacyNote: Your location is used only to find nearby care. It is not saved or shared.

disclaimers.heading: Important Information
disclaimers.notEmergency: This is not a replacement for emergency services. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call 911.
disclaimers.notEligibility: This tool does not determine insurance eligibility or enrollment.
disclaimers.noAppointmentGuarantee: Appointment availability is not guaranteed and depends on provider capacity.
disclaimers.noSeriousMentalIllness: This service is not intended for serious mental illness crises. Call the crisis line at (757) 664-6000.
disclaimers.noControlledSubstances: Controlled substances will not be prescribed through virtual care visits.
